AdminConfig.title: AdminConfig
AdminConfig.description: Stores admin PIN or password hash for authentication.

pinHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the admin access code

setupComplete.description: Whether the admin access code has been configured

Capsule.title: Capsule
Capsule.description: A time capsule containing a message locked until a future date and time.

teaser.description: A hint or teaser of what lies inside

unlockAt.description: ISO timestamp when the capsule unlocks

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the capsule was created

creator.description: Name or nickname of the creator

/capsules/{capsuleId}.description: Collection of locked and unlocked time capsules.
